subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for reaching out — I'd be happy to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

I'm available for a call on any of the following dates and times:
- Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share that information. I'm happy to serve as your primary point of contact and help facilitate the appropriate senior-level introductions from our side.


Thanks,
Assistant
